provenance: Added by v0 ruling: freezing pooled water yields material 'ice'. Mundane material; density 917 is real-world; hardness, thermal constants, valueCp, opacity invented for v0 balance, need Eli's blessing.
notes: Grid material minted by PhaseTransition when FluidSystem emits FluidFrozenEvent for a full-depth water column (water.freezeMinDepth = 7). meltsTo references fluid id 'water': PhaseTransition (THERMAL) owns the melt at meltK, emits MaterialPhaseChangedEvent(yieldUnits=7), and FluidSystem spawns the 7 liquid units next tick (§1.1 #21) — exactly the units consumed at freeze, so the round trip conserves to the unit. Low conductivityQ8 (48) per the v0 ruling; heatCapacityQ8 128 keeps the per-material stability invariant comfortable. flammability 0 so no FLAMMABLE fields; boilK null (no sublimation in v0). opacity 4 of 31: translucent — frozen ponds dim but do not seal skylight columns.
